flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Plaza College rose 44% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.9k → $11.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Plaza College rose 35% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.4k → $20.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Plaza College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.4k → $15.4k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Plaza College are 2% below 6-year earnings ($32.3k → $31.5k).
